summary: Independent QA accepts SIM-004 after re-review. The prior REQUEST_CHANGES blocker is resolved: packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts now passes direct and touched-file Prettier checks. Re-run validation also passed for writer handoff schema, task schema, sim-core RNG tests, deterministic canary, architecture guard, typecheck, lint, git diff whitespace, and full pnpm test. No remaining SIM-004 acceptance blocker was found in ADR-009 compatibility semantics, deterministic RNG domain isolation/replay, DTO serialization readiness, hidden entropy constraints, cross-worker-compatible coverage, or Math.random authority guard coverage.

tests_run.result: SIM-004 implementation, test, ADR, architecture, writer handoff, QA handoff, route, and coordinator metadata files are dirty/untracked in the review worktree.
All matched files use Prettier code style.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/decisions/ADR-009-deterministic-rng-domains.md packages/protocol/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts tests/sim-core-deterministic-rng.test.ts tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts tests/architecture-authority-randomness.test.ts tools/architecture/check-boundaries.mjs
tests_run.result: All explicitly checked SIM-004 touched files use Prettier code style.

Vitest passed 3 files / 21 tests, including SIM-004 RNG golden/domain/DTO/property/worker-compatible coverage. Node emitted the known non-blocking MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for the .ts Worker fixture.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c for the 30-day deterministic hello simulation.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
All workspace package typecheck scripts passed.
architecture:check passed; sim:determinism matched hash 61e0ba1c; root Vitest passed 5 files / 24 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file / 3 tests.
ESLint completed with no reported violations.

decisions: Accepted the SIM-004 formatting fix because the previously failing targeted Prettier reproduction now exits 0.

Accepted ADR-009 and implementation alignment for review scope: algorithm ID, seed/domain fields, DTO state shape, draw index, and compatibility-sensitive golden vector policy are documented and covered by tests.

Accepted deterministic domain isolation/replay evidence: tests cover golden sequences, unrelated domain stability, DTO mid-stream restore, bounded integer draws, generated-domain replay/isolation, and worker-compatible sequence matching.
Accepted authority randomness guard evidence: architecture checker rejects Math.random in authoritative sim-core paths and self-test output is covered by Vitest.
Did not mark task ACCEPTED/CLOSED; this QA handoff routes to lead_orchestrator for integration and state transition.
risks: The repository pnpm format:check script still does not cover packages/sim-core or packages/protocol; this is no longer a SIM-004 blocker because direct targeted checks over SIM-004 touched files passed, but lead may want a follow-up task to close the root format false-negative.

The Worker-compatible RNG test uses Node worker_threads with --experimental-strip-types rather than a browser Dedicated Worker bootstrap, matching the current M0/M1 testing level disclosed by the writer.
Coordinator/project metadata changes remain present in the worktree and should be handled by lead integration policy.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator should validate this ACCEPT handoff, run integration gates as required, and decide SIM-004 task state transition. QA found no remaining acceptance blocker.
